name: Portuguese Potato and Kale Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Chorizo sausage; cut in half lengthwise and sliced
8 All-purpose potatoes (2 lbs total), peeled and trimmed
1 Bunch kale; (1 lb.), trimmed washed and thinly sliced
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a small, nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add chorizo and cook, stirring, until browned, about 5 minutes. Drain the chorizo on paper towels and set aside.
2. In a heavy stockpot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onions and saute until softened, 5 to 10 minutes.
3. Add chicken stock, potatoes and garlic and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, until potatoes are tender, 10 to 15 minutes.
4. With a slotted spoon, transfer the potatoes and garlic to a bowl; lightly mash with a fork. Return to the soup and bring to a simmer.
5. Stir in kale, a handful at a time. Simmer for 5 minutes, or until the kale is tender. Stir in the reserved chorizo and season with salt and pepper.
Serves 8. 254 calories per serving: 10 grams fat, 277 mg sodium and 19 mg cholesterol.
